trends.label: real
trends.title: AI Agent 生态持续扩展
trends.text: 多 agent、工具调用、浏览器操作等方向正在从 demo 走向生产

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 视频生成竞赛加速
trends.text: 多家公司发布视频生成模型，质量和速度都在快速提升

trends.label: watch
trends.title: Benchmark 刷新频率加快
trends.text: 模型性能天花板持续提升，但实际应用差距仍待验证

trends.label: real
trends.title: 多模态成为标配
trends.text: 文本、图像、音频、视频的统一处理能力越来越普遍

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 监管政策收紧
trends.text: 全球多地出台 AI 相关法规，合规成本上升

trends.label: hype
trends.title: AI 替代一切的叙事
trends.text: AI 在特定任务上表现优异，但通用替代仍需时间

all_items.title: OSCAR: Offline Spectral Covariance-Aware Rotation for 2-bit KV Cache Quantization
all_items.summary: INT2 KV-cache quantization is attractive for long-context LLM serving, but it remains difficult to make both accurate and deployable. Simple rotations such as Hadamard transforms reduce outliers, but…
all_items.why_it_matters: OSCAR 证明小模型也能跑出好效果，本地部署成本大幅降低
all_items.content_angle: 在本地跑一下 OSCAR，截图发帖「用自己电脑跑 AI 是什么体验」

all_items.title: Symmetry-Compatible Principle for Optimizer Design: Embeddings, LM Heads, SwiGLU MLPs, and MoE Routers
all_items.summary: A striking geometric disparity has long persisted in the practice of deep learning. While modern neural network architectures naturally exhibit rich symmetry and equivariance properties, popular…
all_items.why_it_matters: Symmetry-Compatible Principle… 提升了 AI 获取和使用外部知识的能力，准确率更高了
all_items.content_angle: 用通俗语言解读 Symmetry-Compatible Principle…，发帖「一句话看懂今天的 AI 论文」

all_items.title: AR-VLA: True Autoregressive Action Expert for Vision-Language-Action Models
all_items.summary: We propose a standalone autoregressive (AR) Action Expert that generates actions as a continuous causal sequence while conditioning on refreshable vision-language prefixes. In contrast to existing…
all_items.why_it_matters: AR-VLA 让 AI 能同时处理文本、图像、语音，应用场景扩大了
all_items.content_angle: 用通俗语言解读 AR-VLA，发帖「一句话看懂今天的 AI 论文」

all_items.title: E-PMQ: Expert-Guided Post-Merge Quantization with Merged-Weight Anchoring
all_items.summary: Low-resource deployment constraints have made model quantization essential for deploying neural networks while preserving performance. Meanwhile, model merging has become an increasingly practical…
all_items.why_it_matters: E-PMQ 证明小模型也能跑出好效果，本地部署成本大幅降低
